parameters.query:
WITH queue_check AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) as current_queue
    FROM orders
    WHERE service_id = $1
    AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
)
SELECT
    -- ข้อมูลตัวหลัก
    s.id as main_id, s.name, s.price as sale_price, s.cost_price as main_cost,
    s.min_qty, s.max_qty, s.refill_service_id, s.price_tiers,
    p.api_url as main_url, p.api_key as main_key, s.provider_service_id as main_pid,

    -- ข้อมูลตัวสำรอง
    bs.id as backup_id, bs.cost_price as backup_cost,
    bp.api_url as backup_url, bp.api_key as backup_key, bs.provider_service_id as backup_pid,

    -- ข้อมูลตัว refill
    rs.id as refill_id, rs.cost_price as refill_cost,
    rp.api_url as refill_url, rp.api_key as refill_key, rs.provider_service_id as refill_pid,

    -- อื่นๆ
    q.current_queue,
    u.balance, u.id as user_db_id
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN services bs ON s.backup_service_id = bs.id 
LEFT JOIN services rs ON s.refill_service_id = rs.id
LEFT JOIN providers p ON s.provider_code = p.code
LEFT JOIN providers bp ON bs.provider_code = bp.code
LEFT JOIN providers rp ON rs.provider_code = rp.code
CROSS JOIN users u
CROSS JOIN queue_check q
WHERE s.id = $1 AND u.id = $2;
UPDATE users SET balance = balance - $1 WHERE id = $2;

INSERT INTO orders (
    user_id, service_id, link, quantity,
    status, provider_order_id,
    cost_amount, sale_amount, remark , start_count
)
VALUES (
    $1, $2, $3, $4,
    'PENDING', $5,
    $6, $7, $8 ,$9
)
RETURNING id , link , quantity , remark ;

-- 1. คืนเงินลูกค้า (Refund)
UPDATE users
SET balance = balance + $1
WHERE id = $2;

-- 2. บันทึกออเดอร์สถานะ FAIL (จะได้รู้ว่าลูกค้าพยายามสั่ง)
INSERT INTO orders (
    user_id, service_id, link, quantity,
    status, sale_amount, cost_amount, remark
)
VALUES (
    $2, $3, $4, $5,
    'FAIL', 0, 0,   -- ยอดขาย/ต้นทุนเป็น 0 เพราะคืนเงินแล้ว
    'Error from Provider: ' || $6 -- เก็บ Error Message ไว้ดูต่างหน้า
)
RETURNING id , link , quantity , remark ;

nodes.name: INPUTDATA ไม่ใช้แล้ว แต่เก็บไว้ดู
